textByHash.ea9bc065cba590644f7f16812e43f3df1e6af989: Greetings friend. I am a manufacturer of leather.
textByHash.f28337342c9624445873e0ade4486e0e083e9592: I make leather from animal hides. Bring me some cowhides and one gold coin per hide, and I'll tan them into soft leather for you.
textByHash.b629e177c42e0685e8b4efca3bceb1df5a3e1bd5: Normal leather may be quite weak, but it's very cheap - I make it from cowhides for only 1 gp per hide - and it's so easy to craft that anyone can work with it.
textByHash.e76513ad7eb879a2d7bf26a5f12ff4ac98f45e67: Alternatively you could try hard leather. It's not so easy to craft, but I only charge 3 gp per cowhide to prepare it, and it makes much sturdier armour.
textByHash.6efb49722a74ef3475949c8a59f900114f7e071b: I can also tan snake hides and dragonhides, suitable for crafting into the highest quality armour for rangers.
textByHash.caae10eaf8847252730d4ec3855b3093411f93d9: I see you have brought me a hide. Would you like me to tan it for you?
textByHash.743526856e39ba245fe6683108682eca17906645: I see you have brought me some hides. Would you like me to tan them for you?
textByHash.34460a7e2bf2a8facd7553a2ca2aefb6dd0d59cd: Very well, sir, as you wish.
textByHash.2019cac44192acb8d9e2ebfb4afdb0006ce93a6f: Very well, madam, as you wish.
